scopeNote: Covers only the core decade/palace/age/direction/traversal determinism for Major Fortune (Đại Vận) under Nam Phái. Every referenced policy is either evidence-linked (status: default) or an explicitly rejected, documented alternative (status: rejected) — none is unresolved or experimental. Tứ Hóa derivation, Phi Hóa, Tự Hóa, natal-transformation-inheritance, Tuần/Triệt semantic treatment, and annual/monthly overlay interaction are deliberately excluded from this profile's scope (see outOfScopeTopics) and must not be assumed available just because this profile is executable.
